rationale: Slice 05 closes the refund/dispute/retry gap, records Stripe origin fields for adjustments, makes refunded pack usage contact-kind aware, adds host-bounce/support restoration helpers, and prevents saved-alert delivery for no-longer-public targets. Focused tests and typecheck pass.
required_next_action: Run the Phase 06 targeted and regression checks, then produce final closeout artifacts and advance state only if the full phase review is approved.
